title: 「雙重否定」句型

source.file: Sentence Structure 79 -「雙重否定句」 Double-Negative Structures.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formulas.labelZh: Not + 帶否定意思的形容詞

formulas.formula: No + singular noun + be + without + noun

example: A painting without a title is not unusual.
exampleZh: 沒有標題的畫並不罕見。

examples.en: A painting without a title is not unusual.
examples.zh: 沒有標題的畫並不罕見。

examples.en: It is not uncommon to see people wearing jackets.
examples.zh: 看見人們穿外套並不罕見。

meaning.zh: 本課的標準雙重否定利用兩個帶否定意思的部分，婉轉地表達較溫和的肯定意思。

rules.zh: 本課所指的是標準英語中的雙重否定，不包括 I don’t know nothing 等非標準形式。
rules.en: This lesson teaches standard-English double negatives, not non-standard forms such as I don’t know nothing.

rules.zh: 雙重否定通常表達較溫和的肯定意思；not uncommon 並不一定等於 very common。
rules.en: A double negative normally expresses a milder positive meaning.

rules.zh: Not impossible 只表示事情有可能做到，並不表示容易或一定會發生。
rules.en: Not impossible means possible, but it does not mean easy or certain.

rules.zh: Not unlikely 表示「頗有可能」，但不是肯定。
rules.en: Not unlikely means fairly likely, but it is not certain.

rules.zh: Not without 表示某事物確實具有某種特點。
rules.en: Not without means that something does have the stated feature.

rules.zh: No X is without Y 表示「每一個 X 都有 Y」。
rules.en: No X is without Y means that every X has Y.

benefits.zh: 它能避免把說法講得過於絕對，令表達更加謹慎。
benefits.en: It helps you avoid making claims that are too strong.

benefits.zh: Not impossible 可以更準確地表示某件事有可能發生，而不暗示它容易或必定成功。
benefits.en: It helps you express possibility more accurately.

benefits.zh: 它能承認一件事情有價值、風險、困難或弱點，同時避免過於極端的判斷。
benefits.en: It helps you present a balanced opinion.

benefits.zh: 評價計劃、證據、結果或不同觀點時，這些句型可以令表達顯得更有分寸。
benefits.en: It is useful in essays, reports and discussions.

benefits.zh: 它讓你不用反覆使用 common、possible、important 或 risky，也能表達相近意思。
benefits.en: It gives you more sentence variety.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using a standard double-negative structure.

You may use structures such as not uncommon, not unusual, not impossible, not unlikely, not unreasonable, not insignificant, not unfamiliar, not unhelpful, not unsuccessful, not unexpected, not without or No...without....
Preserve the original meaning. Do not make the statement stronger or more certain.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用標準的雙重否定句改寫以下句子。
你可以使用 not uncommon、not unusual、not impossible、not unlikely、not unreasonable、not insignificant、not unfamiliar、not unhelpful、not unsuccessful、not unexpected、not without 或 No...without... 等句式。
答案必須保留原意，不可令語氣變得更強烈或更肯定。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Students often feel nervous before important exams.
questions.promptZh: 學生在重要考試前感到緊張是頗為常見的。
questions.answer: It is not uncommon for students to feel nervous before important exams.
questions.answerZh: 學生在重要考試前感到緊張並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not uncommon for students to feel nervous before important exams.

questions.prompt: Seeing people carry umbrellas on sunny days is quite normal in summer.
questions.promptZh: 夏天在晴天看見人們帶雨傘是頗為正常的。
questions.answer: It is not unusual to see people carrying umbrellas on sunny days in summer.
questions.answerZh: 夏天在晴天看見人們帶雨傘並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not unusual to see people carrying umbrellas on sunny days in summer.

questions.prompt: You can finish this short book in a week.
questions.promptZh: 你有可能在一星期內看完這本短篇書籍。
questions.answer: It is not impossible to finish this short book in a week.
questions.answerZh: 在一星期內看完這本短篇書籍並非不可能。
questions.highlight: It is not impossible to finish this short book in a week.

questions.prompt: A painting may have no title, and this is fairly common.
questions.promptZh: 一幅畫可能沒有標題，而這種情況頗為常見。
questions.answer: A painting without a title is not unusual.
questions.answerZh: 沒有標題的畫並不罕見。
questions.highlight: A painting without a title is not unusual.

questions.prompt: Buses sometimes arrive a few minutes late. This happens quite often.
questions.promptZh: 巴士有時會遲到幾分鐘。這種情況頗為常見。
questions.answer: It is not uncommon for buses to arrive a few minutes late.
questions.answerZh: 巴士遲到幾分鐘並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not uncommon for buses to arrive a few minutes late.

questions.prompt: You may still find a quiet seat in the library at lunchtime.
questions.promptZh: 你仍然有可能在午膳時間於圖書館找到安靜的座位。
questions.answer: It is not impossible to find a quiet seat in the library at lunchtime.
questions.answerZh: 在午膳時間於圖書館找到安靜的座位並非不可能。
questions.highlight: It is not impossible to find a quiet seat in the library at lunchtime.

questions.prompt: People quite often wear jackets indoors in strongly air-conditioned places.
questions.promptZh: 人們在冷氣較強的室內地方穿外套是頗為常見的。
questions.answer: It is not unusual for people to wear jackets indoors in strongly air-conditioned places.
questions.answerZh: 人們在冷氣較強的室內地方穿外套並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not unusual for people to wear jackets indoors in strongly air-conditioned places.

questions.prompt: A meal that contains no meat is fairly common at this restaurant.
questions.promptZh: 在這間餐廳，不含肉類的餐點頗為常見。
questions.answer: A meal without meat is not uncommon at this restaurant.
questions.answerZh: 在這間餐廳，不含肉類的餐點並不罕見。
questions.highlight: A meal without meat is not uncommon at this restaurant.

questions.prompt: The plan involves some risk.
questions.promptZh: 這個計劃存在一些風險。
questions.answer: The plan is not without risk.
questions.answerZh: 這個計劃並非沒有風險。
questions.highlight: The plan is not without risk.

questions.prompt: The weather may change this afternoon.
questions.promptZh: 今午的天氣有可能出現變化。
questions.answer: It is not impossible for the weather to change this afternoon.
questions.answerZh: 今午的天氣出現變化並非不可能。
questions.highlight: It is not impossible for the weather to change this afternoon.

questions.prompt: New workers often need time to learn the system.
questions.promptZh: 新員工需要時間學習這個系統是頗為常見的。
questions.answer: It is not uncommon for new workers to need time to learn the system.
questions.answerZh: 新員工需要時間學習這個系統並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not uncommon for new workers to need time to learn the system.

questions.prompt: The old shop still has some charm.
questions.promptZh: 這間舊店仍然有一些魅力。
questions.answer: The old shop is not without charm.
questions.answerZh: 這間舊店並非毫無魅力。
questions.highlight: The old shop is not without charm.

questions.prompt: Clara’s suggestion is quite reasonable.
questions.promptZh: 克拉拉的建議頗為合理。
questions.answer: Clara’s suggestion is not unreasonable.
questions.answerZh: 克拉拉的建議並非不合理。
questions.highlight: Clara’s suggestion is not unreasonable.

questions.prompt: People sometimes queue before the doors open.
questions.promptZh: 人們有時會在開門前排隊。
questions.answer: It is not unusual for people to queue before the doors open.
questions.answerZh: 人們在開門前排隊並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not unusual for people to queue before the doors open.

questions.prompt: The team has a fair chance of winning the final.
questions.promptZh: 這支球隊頗有可能在決賽中勝出。
questions.answer: It is not unlikely that the team will win the final.
questions.answerZh: 這支球隊在決賽中勝出並非不大可能。
questions.highlight: It is not unlikely that the team will win the final.

questions.prompt: This small change has a meaningful effect.
questions.promptZh: 這項小改變帶來了值得注意的影響。
questions.answer: The effect of this small change is not insignificant.
questions.answerZh: 這項小改變所帶來的影響並非微不足道。
questions.highlight: The effect of this small change is not insignificant.

questions.prompt: Family members quite often eat dinner at different times.
questions.promptZh: 家庭成員在不同時間吃晚飯是頗為常見的。
questions.answer: It is not uncommon for family members to eat dinner at different times.
questions.answerZh: 家庭成員在不同時間吃晚飯並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not uncommon for family members to eat dinner at different times.

questions.prompt: The journey included several delays.
questions.promptZh: 這段旅程出現了數次延誤。
questions.answer: The journey was not without delays.
questions.answerZh: 這段旅程並非沒有延誤。
questions.highlight: The journey was not without delays.

questions.prompt: The area looks somewhat familiar to me.
questions.promptZh: 這個地方對我來說有點熟悉。
questions.answer: The area is not unfamiliar to me.
questions.answerZh: 這個地方對我來說並不陌生。
questions.highlight: The area is not unfamiliar to me.

questions.prompt: With some help, you should be able to complete the form.
questions.promptZh: 在得到一些協助的情況下，你應該有可能完成這份表格。
questions.answer: It should not be impossible to complete the form with some help.
questions.answerZh: 在得到一些協助的情況下，完成這份表格應該並非不可能。
questions.highlight: It should not be impossible to complete the form with some help.

questions.prompt: Older buildings often have narrow stairs.
questions.promptZh: 較舊的建築物設有狹窄樓梯是頗為常見的。
questions.answer: It is not uncommon for older buildings to have narrow stairs.
questions.answerZh: 較舊的建築物設有狹窄樓梯並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not uncommon for older buildings to have narrow stairs.

questions.prompt: Despite its cost, the proposal has some benefits.
questions.promptZh: 儘管成本不低，這項建議仍有一些好處。
questions.answer: The proposal is not without benefits despite its cost.
questions.answerZh: 儘管成本不低，這項建議並非毫無好處。
questions.highlight: The proposal is not without benefits despite its cost.

questions.prompt: His comment matters to some extent.
questions.promptZh: 他的評論在某程度上是重要的。
questions.answer: His comment is not unimportant.
questions.answerZh: 他的評論並非不重要。
questions.highlight: His comment is not unimportant.

questions.prompt: There is a reasonable chance that the train will be full.
questions.promptZh: 這班火車頗有可能滿座。
questions.answer: It is not unlikely that the train will be full.
questions.answerZh: 這班火車滿座並非不大可能。
questions.highlight: It is not unlikely that the train will be full.

questions.prompt: The small room still has some value as a meeting space.
questions.promptZh: 這個小房間作為會議空間仍有一些價值。
questions.answer: The small room is not without value as a meeting space.
questions.answerZh: 這個小房間作為會議空間並非毫無價值。
questions.highlight: The small room is not without value as a meeting space.

questions.prompt: Basic cooking skills can be learnt even if you do not have expensive equipment.
questions.promptZh: 即使沒有昂貴的設備，你仍有可能學會基本烹飪技巧。
questions.answer: It is not impossible to learn basic cooking skills without expensive equipment.
questions.answerZh: 在沒有昂貴設備的情況下學會基本烹飪技巧並非不可能。
questions.highlight: It is not impossible to learn basic cooking skills without expensive equipment.

questions.prompt: Her face was somewhat familiar, although I could not remember her name.
questions.promptZh: 她的樣貌有點熟悉，雖然我記不起她的名字。
questions.answer: Her face was not unfamiliar, although I could not remember her name.
questions.answerZh: 她的樣貌並不陌生，雖然我記不起她的名字。
questions.highlight: Her face was not unfamiliar, although I could not remember her name.

questions.prompt: Online meetings often begin with a short delay.
questions.promptZh: 網上會議延遲一會才開始是頗為常見的。
questions.answer: It is not uncommon for online meetings to begin with a short delay.
questions.answerZh: 網上會議延遲一會才開始並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not uncommon for online meetings to begin with a short delay.

questions.prompt: The new rule has some disadvantages.
questions.promptZh: 這項新規則有一些缺點。
questions.answer: The new rule is not without disadvantages.
questions.answerZh: 這項新規則並非沒有缺點。
questions.highlight: The new rule is not without disadvantages.

questions.prompt: Their first event achieved some success.
questions.promptZh: 他們的首次活動取得了一些成功。
questions.answer: Their first event was not unsuccessful.
questions.answerZh: 他們的首次活動並非不成功。
questions.highlight: Their first event was not unsuccessful.

questions.prompt: People often forget their passwords.
questions.promptZh: 人們忘記密碼是頗為常見的。
questions.answer: It is not uncommon for people to forget their passwords.
questions.answerZh: 人們忘記密碼並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not uncommon for people to forget their passwords.

questions.prompt: The repair may be possible, but it will take time.
questions.promptZh: 這項維修可能做得到，但需要一些時間。
questions.answer: The repair is not impossible, but it will take time.
questions.answerZh: 這項維修並非不可能，但需要一些時間。
questions.highlight: The repair is not impossible, but it will take time.

questions.prompt: This idea contains some humour.
questions.promptZh: 這個想法帶有一些幽默感。
questions.answer: This idea is not without humour.
questions.answerZh: 這個想法並非毫無幽默感。
questions.highlight: This idea is not without humour.

questions.prompt: Because of the storm, the delay was somewhat expected.
questions.promptZh: 由於暴風雨的關係，這次延誤在某程度上是預料之內的。
questions.answer: The delay was not entirely unexpected because of the storm.
questions.answerZh: 由於暴風雨的關係，這次延誤並非完全出乎意料。
questions.highlight: The delay was not entirely unexpected because of the storm.

questions.prompt: The evidence has a meaningful effect on the decision.
questions.promptZh: 這項證據對決定有值得注意的影響。
questions.answer: The effect of the evidence on the decision is not insignificant.
questions.answerZh: 這項證據對決定造成的影響並非微不足道。
questions.highlight: The effect of the evidence on the decision is not insignificant.

questions.prompt: The park still has some charm despite the traffic noise.
questions.promptZh: 儘管有交通噪音，這個公園仍然有一些魅力。
questions.answer: The park is not without charm despite the traffic noise.
questions.answerZh: 儘管有交通噪音，這個公園並非毫無魅力。
questions.highlight: The park is not without charm despite the traffic noise.

questions.prompt: Staff sometimes answer emails after office hours.
questions.promptZh: 員工有時會在辦公時間後回覆電郵。
questions.answer: It is not unheard of for staff to answer emails after office hours.
questions.answerZh: 員工在辦公時間後回覆電郵並非前所未聞。
questions.highlight: It is not unheard of for staff to answer emails after office hours.

questions.prompt: The teacher’s explanation was helpful to some students.
questions.promptZh: 老師的解釋對部分學生有幫助。
questions.answer: The teacher’s explanation was not unhelpful to some students.
questions.answerZh: 老師的解釋對部分學生並非毫無幫助。
questions.highlight: The teacher’s explanation was not unhelpful to some students.

questions.prompt: You can complete the task without special software.
questions.promptZh: 你有可能在沒有特別軟件的情況下完成這項任務。
questions.answer: It is not impossible to complete the task without special software.
questions.answerZh: 在沒有特別軟件的情況下完成這項任務並非不可能。
questions.highlight: It is not impossible to complete the task without special software.

questions.prompt: Every neighbourhood has some noise.
questions.promptZh: 每個社區都有一些噪音。
questions.answer: No neighbourhood is without noise.
questions.answerZh: 沒有任何社區是完全沒有噪音的。
questions.highlight: No neighbourhood is without noise.

questions.prompt: The project had difficulties, but the team finished it on time.
questions.promptZh: 這個項目遇到了一些困難，但團隊仍然按時完成了它。
questions.answer: The project was not without difficulties, but the team finished it on time.
questions.answerZh: 這個項目並非沒有困難，但團隊仍然按時完成了它。
questions.highlight: The project was not without difficulties, but the team finished it on time.

questions.prompt: Patients quite often feel tired after this simple test.
questions.promptZh: 病人在完成這項簡單測試後感到疲倦是頗為常見的。
questions.answer: It is not uncommon for patients to feel tired after this simple test.
questions.answerZh: 病人在完成這項簡單測試後感到疲倦並不罕見。
questions.highlight: It is not uncommon for patients to feel tired after this simple test.

questions.prompt: The manager’s concern is reasonable, even if we disagree with her solution.
questions.promptZh: 即使我們不同意經理的解決方法，她的憂慮仍然頗為合理。
questions.answer: The manager’s concern is not unreasonable, even if we disagree with her solution.
questions.answerZh: 即使我們不同意經理的解決方法，她的憂慮亦並非不合理。
questions.highlight: The manager’s concern is not unreasonable, even if we disagree with her solution.

questions.prompt: There is a real possibility that the small business will recover next year.
questions.promptZh: 這間小型企業明年確實有可能恢復過來。
questions.answer: It is not impossible that the small business will recover next year.
questions.answerZh: 這間小型企業明年恢復過來並非不可能。
questions.highlight: It is not impossible that the small business will recover next year.

questions.prompt: The early results are important, although more data is needed.
questions.promptZh: 初步結果相當重要，儘管我們仍需要更多數據。
questions.answer: The early results are not insignificant, although more data is needed.
questions.answerZh: 初步結果並非無關緊要，儘管我們仍需要更多數據。
questions.highlight: The early results are not insignificant, although more data is needed.

questions.prompt: The old map looks somewhat familiar to many visitors because it resembles the modern one.
questions.promptZh: 這張舊地圖令不少訪客感到有點熟悉，因為它與現代地圖相似。
questions.answer: The old map is not unfamiliar to many visitors because it resembles the modern one.
questions.answerZh: 這張舊地圖對不少訪客來說並不陌生，因為它與現代地圖相似。
questions.highlight: The old map is not unfamiliar to many visitors because it resembles the modern one.

questions.prompt: Every major decision involves some risk.
questions.promptZh: 每項重大決定都涉及一些風險。
questions.answer: No major decision is without risk.
questions.answerZh: 沒有任何重大決定是完全沒有風險的。
questions.highlight: No major decision is without risk.

questions.prompt: The system was useful in some ways, although it did not solve every problem.
questions.promptZh: 這個系統在某些方面有幫助，雖然它未能解決所有問題。
questions.answer: The system was not unhelpful, although it did not solve every problem.
questions.answerZh: 這個系統並非毫無幫助，雖然它未能解決所有問題。
questions.highlight: The system was not unhelpful, although it did not solve every problem.

questions.prompt: The campaign achieved some success despite its limited budget.
questions.promptZh: 儘管預算有限，這項宣傳活動仍取得了一些成功。
questions.answer: The campaign was not unsuccessful despite its limited budget.
questions.answerZh: 儘管預算有限，這項宣傳活動並非不成功。
questions.highlight: The campaign was not unsuccessful despite its limited budget.

questions.prompt: The report has weaknesses, but it also offers useful evidence and practical ideas.
questions.promptZh: 這份報告有一些弱點，但亦提供了有用的證據和實際可行的想法。
questions.answer: The report is not without weaknesses, but it also offers useful evidence and practical ideas.
questions.answerZh: 這份報告並非沒有弱點，但亦提供了有用的證據和實際可行的想法。
questions.highlight: The report is not without weaknesses, but it also offers useful evidence and practical ideas.
